# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 1
#### Article 1. Words & Phrases Defined
##### § 117-C — Hazardous materials emergency vehicle

Every designated vehicle operated by a hazardous materials emergency response team created pursuant to General Municipal Law § 209-Y (Establishment of hazardous materials emergency response teams) specifically equipped for and used in response to reports of emergencies resulting from actual or potential releases, spills or leaks of, or other exposure to hazardous substances.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
